Test Description: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com 2. Enter username 'standard_user' in username field 3. Enter password 'secret_sauce' in password field 4. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is redirected to products page and inventory list is displayed

Test Description: Verify login fails with invalid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com 2. Enter username 'wrong_user' in username field 3. Enter password 'wrong_pass' in password field 4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error message 'Username and password do not match' is displayed

Test Description: Verify adding a product to cart
Pre-conditions: User is logged in as standard_user
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com and login with standard_user and secret_sauce 2. Click 'Add to cart' button on first product Sauce Labs Backpack 3. Click cart icon on top right
Expected Result: Cart page shows Sauce Labs Backpack with correct price $29.99

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and has item in cart
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com and login 2. Add Sauce Labs Backpack to cart 3. Click cart icon 4. Click Checkout button 5. Enter First Name John Last Name Doe Zip 12345 6. Click Continue 7. Click Finish
Expected Result: Order confirmation page shows Thank you for your order

Pre-conditions: User is logged in as standard_user
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com and login with standard_user and secret_sauce 2. Click burger menu icon top left 3. Click Logout link
